name: loop-it
description: Find, recommend, and run bounded agent loops across turn-based, goal-based, time-based, and proactive patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded agent loops with proof.
interface.longDescription: Loop it packages a portable loop router, balanced loop library, launcher, local GitHub PR connector, and Agent Skill that helps Codex inspect a codebase, pick the right loop pattern, run local goal-based verifier-gated passes, or create Codex Scheduled heartbeats for time-based and proactive workflows. It is local runner tooling, not a hosted background service.
defaultPrompt: Use $loop-it to inspect this repo and run the right repair loop.
Use $loop-it to fix this failing check with proof.
Use $loop-it to find the next actionable loop.
